### Remarks

<b>DEPLOYMENT SECURITY:</b> The [ConfigStoreName](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.DomainServices.DomainServiceOptions.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Server.DomainServices.DomainServiceOptions.ConfigStoreName 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.DomainServices\.DomainServiceOptions\.ConfigStoreName') references a DAPR config store
            component. Write access to this store must be restricted to admin service accounts only (Red Team H2).
            Config store poisoning can redirect domain service registrations to malicious endpoints.
